{
    "cefr_level": "B1",
    "level_basis": {
        "textinspector_level_raw": null,
        "flesch_kincaid": null,
        "rule_notes": "No external indicators provided; B1 assigned due to task completion (10 sentences) and connected text, despite A2-level grammar errors."
    },
    "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",
    "communicative_task_notes": [
        "Student meets the sentence count requirement (approx. 10-11 sentences).",
        "Advice is relevant and structured (numbered list).",
        "Register is appropriate for a Telegram chat context."
    ],
    "grammar_score": 0.65,
    "corrections": [
        "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
        "simular -> similar (Spelling; A2; Low)",
        "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
        "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
        "spend a lot of time to TV -> spend a lot of time on TV (Preposition; A2; Medium)",
        "leave from useless groups -> leave useless groups (Preposition; A2; Medium)",
        "enought -> enough (Spelling; A2; Low)",
        "I hope, my tips -> I hope my tips (Punctuation; A2; Low)",
        "write me at personal messages -> message me privately (Collocation; B1; Medium)"
    ],
    "errors_by_category": {
        "Lexis": [
            {
                "excerpt": "write me at personal messages",
                "correction": "message me privately",
                "comment": "Collocation error; 'personal messages' is not standard phrasing for direct contact.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "B1"
            }
        ],
        "Grammar": [
            {
                "excerpt": "Here is the tips",
                "correction": "Here are the tips",
                "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error with plural noun.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "this apps",
                "correction": "these apps",
                "comment": "Demonstrative agreement error with plural noun.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "spend a lot of time to TV",
                "correction": "spend a lot of time on TV",
                "comment": "Incorrect preposition after 'spend time'.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Punctuation": [
            {
                "excerpt": "I hope, my tips",
                "correction": "I hope my tips",
                "comment": "Unnecessary comma after introductory clause.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Word order": [],
        "Sentence structure": [],
        "Text organization": [],
        "Discourse markers": [],
        "Rhetorical features": [],
        "Register": [
            {
                "excerpt": "i",
                "correction": "I",
                "comment": "Lowercase first-person pronoun.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A1"
            }
        ],
        "Incomprehensibility": []
    },
    "strengths": [
        {
            "item": "For more information",
            "cefr_level": "B1",
            "category": "Discourse marker",
            "note": "Appropriate closing phrase for advice."
        },
        {
            "item": "Manage your time",
            "cefr_level": "B1",
            "category": "Vocabulary",
            "note": "Standard collocation for the topic."
        }
    ],
    "feedback": "Level B1: The student successfully fulfills the task requirements (length, content, register) and produces connected text. However, accuracy in basic grammar (agreement, prepositions) remains at A2 level. Meaning is clear despite errors.",
    "next_steps": [
        "Review subject-verb agreement (is/are, this/these).",
        "Practice prepositions with common verbs (spend time on, leave groups).",
        "Proofread for spelling (similar, enough) and capitalization (I)."
    ]
}

    "next_steps": [
